uplink.description: PLUS sensor reading: temperature/humidity/co2 -> air.*, formaldehyde/TVOC/PM/indices/noise -> extras
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds PLUS reading. Bytes hand-built to the upstream wire layout (big-endian uint16 fields; 'PLUS' type tag at bytes 27-30); expected.data is the normalized form of the upstream reference decoder's output for these bytes (temperature/humidity/co2 routed to air.*, all other measured fields kept as camelCase extras).

uplink.description: Device configuration message (bytes[0]=0): no measurements, settings as extras
uplink._note: Upstream example input (Apache-2.0). expected.data authored here: the configuration message carries no climate/air-quality measurement, so the codec emits only camelCase extras and no air block. Matches the upstream reference decoder for these bytes.

uplink.description: Device information message (bytes[0]=2): firmware/model/MAC/Modbus as extras
uplink._note: Upstream example input (Apache-2.0). expected.data authored here: info message carries no measurement, only diagnostic extras; matches the upstream reference decoder for these bytes.

uplink.description: Sensor reading with an unrecognized device type tag returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic: same PLUS layout but the type tag at bytes 27-30 spells 'ZZZZ', which the upstream type whitelist (MINI/MICA/PLUS/WELL/NULL) rejects and decodes nothing. The codec surfaces this as an error rather than emitting an empty measurement.

uplink.description: Unrecognized message-type discriminator returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic: bytes[0]=9 is outside the upstream switch (0/1/2). The upstream default branch returns an empty object; the codec reports an error instead so the result is never a bare {}.
